# AI Context Index

Generated by `pnpm context:update`.

## Root Scripts

- `build`: `pnpm -r --if-present build`
- `check:boundaries`: `node ./scripts/check-boundaries.mjs`
- `check:context`: `node ./scripts/update-ai-context.mjs --check`
- `check:docs`: `node ./scripts/check-ai-docs.mjs`
- `context:update`: `node ./scripts/update-ai-context.mjs`
- `dev`: `pnpm -r --parallel --if-present dev`
- `dev:ui`: `pnpm --filter @fatherhood-companion/ui dev`
- `dev:web`: `pnpm --filter web dev`
- `guardrails`: `pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm check:docs && pnpm check:context && pnpm check:boundaries`
- `lint`: `biome check .`
- `lint:fix`: `biome check --write .`
- `prepare`: `husky`
- `typecheck`: `pnpm -r --if-present typecheck`

## Workspaces

### web

- Kind: app
- Path: `apps/web`
- Internal dependencies: `@fatherhood-companion/ai`, `@fatherhood-companion/db`, `@fatherhood-companion/domain`, `@fatherhood-companion/ui`
- Scripts:
  - `build`: `next build`
  - `dev`: `next dev`
  - `lint`: `biome check .`
  - `lint:fix`: `biome check --write .`
  - `start`: `next start`
  - `test`: `vitest run`
  - `test:watch`: `vitest`
  - `typecheck`: `tsc --noEmit`

### @fatherhood-companion/ai

- Kind: package
- Path: `packages/ai`
- Internal dependencies: `@fatherhood-companion/domain`
- Scripts:
  - `lint`: `biome check .`
  - `lint:fix`: `biome check --write .`
  - `typecheck`: `tsc --noEmit`

### @fatherhood-companion/db

- Kind: package
- Path: `packages/db`
- Internal dependencies: none
- Scripts:
  - `db:generate`: `prisma generate`
  - `db:migrate`: `prisma migrate dev`
  - `db:push`: `prisma db push`
  - `db:seed`: `tsx prisma/seed.ts`
  - `db:studio`: `prisma studio`
  - `lint`: `biome check .`
  - `lint:fix`: `biome check --write .`
  - `typecheck`: `tsc --noEmit`

### @fatherhood-companion/domain

- Kind: package
- Path: `packages/domain`
- Internal dependencies: none
- Scripts:
  - `lint`: `biome check .`
  - `lint:fix`: `biome check --write .`
  - `typecheck`: `tsc --noEmit`

### @fatherhood-companion/ui

- Kind: package
- Path: `packages/ui`
- Internal dependencies: `@fatherhood-companion/domain`
- Scripts:
  - `build`: `storybook build`
  - `dev`: `storybook dev -p 6006`
  - `lint`: `biome check .`
  - `lint:fix`: `biome check --write .`
  - `typecheck`: `tsc --noEmit`

## Hard Boundaries

- Apps compose packages, but no workspace may import another app.
- Packages may depend on packages, but packages may never import apps.
- Cross-workspace imports must use package names, not filesystem paths.
- Deep imports into another workspace are forbidden.
- Repeated failures must be written into `docs/ai/mistake-log.md` and, when possible, promoted into automation.
